mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_chemical_clp WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_chemical_clp WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_chemical_clp WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT * FROM tb_chemical_clp WHERE deleted = 0
AND (chemical_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR cas_number LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_chemical_clp ( chemical_name, cas_number, clp_classification, signal_word, h_codes, p_codes, last_updated, status, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{chemicalName}, #{casNumber}, #{clpClassification}, #{signalWord}, #{hCodes}, #{pCodes}, #{lastUpdated,jdbcType=DATE}, #{status}, #{deleted}, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_chemical_clp SET chemical_name = #{chemicalName}, cas_number = #{casNumber}, clp_classification = #{clpClassification}, signal_word = #{signalWord}, h_codes = #{hCodes}, p_codes = #{pCodes}, last_updated = #{lastUpdated,jdbcType=DATE}, status = #{status}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_chemical_clp SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
